purpose: SolarPro Global — beta-testing invitee master list (Ghana solar suppliers & installers)
schema_notes: roles[] = supplier (sells panels/inverters/batteries), installer (designs+installs systems), or both. phones[] is a list because Ghana companies typically list 2-4 numbers (MTN/Vodafone/AT). Empty string '' means we found a value but it was blank on the source; null means we could not confirm from public sources.

entities.name: Ozo Solar Limited
entities.services: Solar panel installation (on/off-grid), energy storage, maintenance, CCTV, solar street lighting, solar water pumps, construction
entities.notes: Self-styled 'Ghana's Premier Solar Company'. Wholesale + retail.

entities.name: Translight Solar Ltd
entities.services: Solar systems installation (residential, commercial, industrial). Ghana Climate Innovation Center alumni.
entities.address: 98 Boundary Rd, Accra, Greater Accra, Ghana
entities.contact_person: Iddrisu Fawuziya (Sales & Marketing) — verify via LinkedIn
entities.notes: Marketed as 'Africa's most trusted'. Strong commercial pipeline.

entities.name: Optima Solar Systems Limited
entities.services: Panel sales + installation, hybrid/off-grid/on-grid inverters, lithium + gel batteries, 3kW/5kW/10kW home kits, commercial systems, solar pumps + irrigation, smart home, PAYG financing, solar insurance
entities.address: 33 Sir Arku Korsah Road, Airport Residential Area, Accra
entities.city: Accra (also Kumasi, Takoradi, Cape Coast, Tamale)
entities.notes: Multi-city footprint. Ships internationally (UK orders mentioned).

entities.name: Deep Solar Ghana
entities.services: Solar installation for homes & businesses, off-grid systems, system sizing, instant quotes, maintenance. Has a mobile quote app.
entities.notes: Energy Commission of Ghana certified. Already builds a quote tool — likely receptive to a design SaaS.

entities.name: Nocheski & Co Limited
entities.services: Design + install of solar systems (residential/commercial/industrial); inverters, charge controllers (MPPT/PWM), mono/poly panels, AGM/GEL batteries, Chauvin Arnoux test instruments, solar irrigation consultancy
entities.address: Tesano: 10 Abeka Road, Tesano Commercial Plaza, NO. C10, Accra | Tema: TDA/TMA shop #139, Community 2 Shopping Centre
entities.notes: Victron Energy, Fronius and Jinko partner. Multi-location, well-stocked. Top BOQ-fulfillment partner candidate.

entities.name: Franerix Solar Solutions Limited
entities.services: Solar energy products (end-user, retail, wholesale), deep-cycle batteries, panels, system installation
entities.address: House No. C4 Kiwi Drive, Emef's Lagoon View Estate, Lashibi, Accra
entities.notes: In business since 2007. Mon-Fri 08:00-17:00, Sat 08:00-14:00. Long track record.

entities.name: Solar Mate Ghana
entities.services: Customised energy + water-treatment solutions for homes, businesses, institutions; supplier + installer
entities.notes: Cross-sells water treatment — useful for off-grid integrated projects.

entities.name: Suka Wind and Solar Ltd (Suka Solar Ghana)
entities.services: Installation, energy storage leasing, electrical wiring, site inspection + energy surveys, monitoring, solar academy + training, project consultancy, equipment sales
entities.address: Odorkor Terrazzo Road, Ablekuma, GA-557-5979, Accra
entities.notes: Runs a training academy — culturally aligned with a design SaaS.

entities.name: Dyson Energy Solar
entities.services: Solar panels + batteries for homes and businesses; commercial energy solutions
entities.address: Odaw Ave, Awudome Estate, Kaneshie, Accra | No. 4 Accra City Car Park, Bishop Lamaire Lk, High Street, Accra-Central

entities.name: Supply Master
entities.services: Managed marketplace + procurement platform for verified suppliers; mono/poly panels, tools, building materials, electrical/IT/auto categories
entities.notes: E-commerce only — no install. Strong fit for BOQ pricing API integration.

entities.name: Maypatronic (Volant Digital Ltd)
entities.services: Inverter batteries, lithium batteries, solar panels + systems, inverters, charge controllers, electronics; consultation
entities.address: No fixed Ghana office published — delivers to main cities
entities.notes: Nigerian phone code (+234) — confirm Ghana presence before invite. Marketed as competitive on price.

entities.name: Vantom Power
entities.services: Tubular / lithium-ion / deep-cycle batteries, hybrid inverters, polycrystalline + frameless panels, charge controllers, automotive batteries
entities.address: Odorkor Terrazzo Road, Ablekuma, Accra | 98 Boundary Road East, Legon, Accra (verify — addresses overlap with other listings)
entities.notes: Indian battery brand sold in Ghana via local distributors (likely Suka). Treat Indian phones as parent-company export desk.

entities.name: Measurements
entities.services: Solar panel installation, electrical engineering, energy storage, system maintenance, energy audits, commercial projects
entities.notes: Pitches commercial/industrial scale — schools, hospitals, industrial sites.

entities.name: Energy Precisions
entities.services: Turn-key solar — design, installation, equipment supply, maintenance — for residential, commercial, industrial, agricultural
entities.notes: Site is JS-rendered — phone/email need a manual visit before invite.

entities.name: Electricons Ghana Company Ltd (EGCL)
entities.services: Solar panel installation, maintenance, hybrid energy systems for homes, offices, industries
entities.address: Accra (operates Greater Accra, Ashanti, Western, Northern)
entities.notes: Site blocks scraping (403) — manual contact form fill needed before invite.
